name: The House in the Forest
short_description: The House in the Forest is a short, first-person exploration game about a family who moved out to go live a lonely life. You'll play as a person who got lost on the way back to his house ends up discovering clean but an abandoned house.
detailed_description:
The House in the Forest is a short, first-person exploration game about a family who moved out to go live a lonely life. You'll play as a person who got lost on the way back to his house ends up discovering clean but an abandoned house.

Features:

- Discovering events of the story through the notes/diary scattered in the environment.
- An exploration in a rich, detailed realistic environment.
- Primarily a "Walking-Simulator"
- Environmental storytelling.
about_the_game:
